title: The Internecine Strife (fitnah) among the North and South Arabs in Syria
description: The Internecine Strife (fitnah) among the North and South Arabs in Syria. Recorded under the year 175 AH (791–792 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 30.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
